data.description: Free sports streaming API with live match data, scores, schedules, and embeddable HLS streams. Access NFL, NBA, UFC, Premier League, Cricket, F1 and 100+ sports. No API key required. CORS enabled.
data.html:
← Back to DAMITV
DAMITV API

Free Sports Streaming API

Access live sports data and embed streams on your website — completely free, no API key required

No API Key Required

Start making requests immediately. No signup, no authentication, no rate limits.

CORS Enabled

Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * — works directly from browser JavaScript.

Embeddable Streams

Get ready-to-use embed URLs. Drop an iframe on your site and streams play instantly.

Real-Time Data

Live scores, match status, team badges, event posters — updated every 60 seconds.

10+ Sports

Football, NBA, NFL, UFC, Cricket, F1, Rugby, AFL, MLB, Ice Hockey and more.

100% Free

No subscription, no credit card, no hidden fees. Free forever.

Supported Sports

Football (Soccer)Basketball (NBA)American Football (NFL)Baseball (MLB)UFC / MMABoxingCricket (IPL, T20)Rugby (NRL)AFLMotorsports (F1, MotoGP)Ice Hockey (NHL)Wrestling (WWE)

Base URL

https://dami-tv.pro/papi

Quick Start

// Fetch all live matches
const res = await fetch('https://dami-tv.pro/papi/api/streams');
const data = await res.json();

// Get embed URL for a match
const match = data.streams[0].streams[0];
console.log(match.embed);
// "https://dami-tv.pro/embed/?id=nba/2026-05-16/lal-bos"
# curl
curl https://dami-tv.pro/papi/api/streams

Endpoints

Ping

GET/api/ping

Check API status and get available mirror domains.

success (boolean) - Request status
domains (array) - Available mirror domains

Get All Streams

GET/api/streams

Returns all matches grouped by category with embed URLs. Poll every 60 seconds for updates.

success (boolean) - Request status
timestamp (integer) - Unix timestamp
performance (float) - Response time in seconds
streams (array) - Categories with matches





Stream Object




FieldTypeDescription


idstringUnique match identifier


namestringMatch title


posterstringEvent poster image URL


starts_atintegerStart time (Unix timestamp)


ends_atintegerEnd time (Unix timestamp)


statusstring"live" or "upcoming"


leaguestringLeague name


category_namestringSport category


teamsobjectHome/away team names and badges


embedstringReady-to-use embed URL for iframe





Example Response


{
  "success": true,
  "timestamp": 1778900000,
  "performance": 0.15,
  "streams": [
    {
      "category": "Basketball",
      "id": 1,
      "streams": [
        {
          "id": "nba/2026-05-16/lal-bos",
          "name": "Lakers vs. Celtics",
          "poster": "https://dami-tv.pro/spimg/...",
          "starts_at": 1778900000,
          "status": "live",
          "league": "NBA",
          "teams": {
            "home": { "name": "Lakers" },
            "away": { "name": "Celtics" }
          },
          "embed": "https://dami-tv.pro/embed/?id=nba%2F2026-05-16%2Flal-bos"
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}



Embedding Streams


Use the embed URL from the API response to add live sports to your website in seconds:



<iframe src="https://dami-tv.pro/embed/?id=nba%2F2026-05-16%2Flal-bos" width="100%" height="500" frameborder="0" scrolling="no" allowfullscreen></iframe>



The embed automatically selects the best available stream from multiple servers. Works on any website.



Categories




CategorySports Covered


footballPremier League, La Liga, Serie A, Champions League, World Cup


basketballNBA, EuroLeague, FIBA


american-footballNFL, College Football, UFL


baseballMLB


fightUFC, Boxing, MMA, WWE


cricketIPL, T20 World Cup, Test Matches, ODI


rugbyNRL, Super Rugby, Six Nations


aflAFL Premiership


motor-sportsFormula 1, MotoGP, NASCAR, IndyCar





Usage Rules




✓ Embedding streams on your website using the embed URL


✓ Using the API to display match listings and schedules


✓ Building apps, bots, or dashboards with our data


✓ Server-side caching (poll every 60 seconds max)


✓ Commercial use — show ads around our embeds




✗ Extracting or redistributing raw stream URLs


✗ Removing or hiding ads from embeds


✗ Sandboxing or modifying embed behavior


✗ Claiming the API or data as your own product





Frequently Asked Questions




Is this API really free? No hidden costs?
Yes, 100% free. No API key, no signup, no subscription. We monetize through ads in the embed player, so you get free data and streams, and we earn from ad impressions.


How is this different from Streamed.pk or PPV.to API?
DAMITV API provides similar functionality — live match data, team info, and embeddable streams. Key differences: no API key required, wider sport coverage (10+ categories), and the embed includes multiple server fallbacks for reliability.


Can I use this for my IPTV app or Kodi addon?
Yes! The API returns standard JSON. You can integrate it into any application — web, mobile, IPTV, Kodi, or desktop.


How reliable are the streams?
Each match has multiple server sources. If one server is down, the embed automatically falls back to the next available source.


Can I build a clone site with this API?
Yes! Build a frontend that consumes our API and displays matches with our embed player. Just don't remove ads from the embeds.





Use Cases




Sports Streaming Websites
Build a complete live sports site in hours using our API for data and embeds for playback.


Telegram & Discord Bots
Create bots that post live match schedules and stream links to your community.


Mobile Apps
Integrate live sports data into iOS/Android apps with our JSON API.


IPTV Playlists
Generate M3U playlists from our match data for use in media players.





Contact & Community


Questions, partnerships, or need help integrating?

 Join Telegram




DAMITV API © 2026 — Free Sports Streaming API for Developers


Alternative to: Streamed.pk API, PPV.to API, SportSRC API, EmbedSportex API
